top_signals.title: Godiva Japan Said to Seek Extension on $464 Million LBO Loan
top_signals.summary: Godiva Japan Inc. is in talks with its banking syndicate to extend the repayment deadline on leveraged buyout financing as the chocolate maker struggles in the major Asian market, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Spot Power Price Jumps on Still and Cloudy Weather
top_signals.summary: A key spot price in Australia’s electricity market jumped as calm conditions curbed wind turbine output, highlighting weather’s growing role as a driver of power market volatility.

top_signals.title: How Starmer was undone by caution and no clear plan
top_signals.summary: Labour in ‘last chance saloon’ as party’s shortest-serving prime minister announces resignation
